retry_reason: If tt_req_node is NULL the function is a no-op; if not, kref_put reduces refcount and may free the node – retrying with the same pointer would cause use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases a reference on a batadv_tt_req_node by calling kref_put. It safely handles NULL input by doing nothing. The caller must not use the node after this call, as the reference count may drop to zero and the node be freed. This is the release side of the lifecycle, paired with a corresponding get (e.g., batadv_tt_req_node_get). No lock or RCU constraints beyond those inherited from kref semantics.
